ddls:
CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field (e.g., CH4_STOPPED, MID_STREAM_BSY) */,
  "hw_access" TEXT /* Hardware access type (e.g., W, R) */,
  "sw_access" TEXT /* Software access type (e.g., W, R) */,
  "reset_value" INTEGER /* Reset value of the configuration */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the configuration belongs to */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the configuration belongs to */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the configuration belongs to */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the configuration */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the configuration */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was last modified */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the configuration */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the configuration is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the product */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the product */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the product */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, released) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the version */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the component belongs to */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the component */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the component */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the component */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration the history entry belongs to */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the history entry belongs to */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the configuration was changed */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the history entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the history entry was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the history entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the history entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_history_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_history_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_history_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_history_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user account */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the user account */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the configuration */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the access */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the access */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_products" (
  "config_product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration-product association */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_products_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_products_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
